title: CU later
description: My take on a datapack that replaces redstone component's iron with copper (and some other tweaks)
body:
Been wanting to give copper a more meaningful purpose?
with this pack all blocks that are considered "redstone components" have copper in their recipes


recipes that has been changed:

- rails (most types), hoppers, tripwire hook and pistons: requires copper ingots instead of iron
- powered rails: requires 4 copper ingots and 2 gold ingots
- crafters: still need some iron for its recipe

there is also a resourcepack build in to reflect the changes


(high chance that this most likely can cause some conflicts and compatiblity issues)
